ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot carefully grasping and lifting a key. The sequence focuses on the precision and deliberate movement needed for such a task.  The left arm will primarily act as a support, while the right arm will perform the key-handling action.  I'll check the examples to ensure smooth transitions and that the poses are within the robot's physical limits. Frame 1 shows the robot's arms in a neutral position. Frame 2 will show the right arm reaching down, then Frame 3 will have the robot grasping the key with the right arm. Frame 4 has the robot lifting the key, and the final frame shows the key being held up.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed, ready for the task
left arm stays steady, right arm reaches down
right hand angles to grasp the hidden key
the key is lifted carefully upwards
the key is presented, held aloft
